zh.lifeSummary: 當Raymond de Sully於1172年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Sir Walter De Sully33歲，母親Mabel De Torrington19歲。他和Mabilia de Torrington至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1242年在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 托林頓享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sully
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armelle, Christophe, Geralde, Luce, Pierre, Reynald.
English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the three places called Sully in Calvados (Normandy), Aisne (Picardy), and Loiret (Centre); see 6 below.

English: of Norman origin, perhaps a habitational name from Sully (Glamorgan). However, the placename is manorial in origin, from the Norman surname in 1 above, which is recorded in Glamorgan in the 12th century.

variants.name: Soley
meanings: Catalan: variant of Solell, a topographic name from solell ‘sunny side, southern slope’, from a derivative of sol ‘sun’. Compare Sol 2.

nameMeanings.name: Raymond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Raimund, of Germanic origin, from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + mund ‘protector’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. Subsequently it dropped out of use, but was revived in the middle of the 19th century, together with several other given names of Old English and Norman origin.

en.lifeSummary: When Raymond de Sully was born in 1172, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Walter De Sully, was 33 and his mother, Mabel De Torrington, was 19. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Mabilia de Torrington. He died in 1242, in Great Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

ja.lifeSummary: Raymond de Sullyが1172年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Sir Walter De Sullyは33歳，母Mabel De Torringtonは19歳であった。彼はMabilia de Torringtonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1242年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト トリントンで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Raymond de Sully(이)가 1172년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter De Sully(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel De Torrington(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Mabilia de Torrington(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 토링턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
